default_item_tasks_body: Use AI to draft implementation steps and turn open issues into actionable work.

with_images_a11y_heading: Copilot workflows with expressive dither background

with_rivers_top_body: With GitHub Copilot, get suggestions for whole lines or entire functions right inside your editor.
